title: Mallalli Falls
tagline: Mallalli Falls — heritage city of Karnataka

overview.short: Mallalli Falls is situated in the Somwarpet, Coorg in Karnataka state in south India.
overview.description: Mallalli Falls is situated in the Somwarpet, Coorg in Karnataka state in south India. The Kumaradhara River is the main watercourse for this waterfall. The Kumaradhara later flows through Kukke Subrahmanya and merges with the Netravati River at Uppinangadi, which then empties into the Arabian Sea at Mangalore.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kuttur
topPlaces.description: Kuttur is a small village in Somwarpet Taluk in Kodagu District of Karnataka State, India. It comes under Shanivarsanthe Hobli.

topPlaces.name: Sulimalthe
topPlaces.description: Sulimalthe is a village in the Kodagu district of the Indian state of Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Somwarpet
topPlaces.description: Somwarpet (somavārapēte, also written Somvarpet) is a panchayat town in Kodagu district in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is the main town of the Somwarpet taluk, in the north-east of the district.

topPlaces.name: Somwarpet taluk
topPlaces.description: Somawarpete taluk is one of the five taluks of Kodagu district. Its administrative headquarters is in the town of Somwarpet.

topPlaces.name: Honnamana Kere
topPlaces.description: Honnamana Kere (Honnama Lake) is a lake and holy place in Doddamalthe near the village of Sulimalthe, 6 km away from Somwarpet town of Coorg in the state of Karnataka, India. It is the biggest lake in Kodagu, and once a year, during the Gowri festival, a special pooja is conducted and a 'Bagina' which consists of the belongings of goddess Honamma is presented to the lake.

topPlaces.name: Thakeri
topPlaces.description: Thakeri is a village in Kodagu district in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is located about 9 km from Somwarpet.

topPlaces.name: Abbimatta
topPlaces.description: Abbimatta is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Somvarpet taluk of Kodagu district.

topPlaces.name: Shanthalli
topPlaces.description: Shanthalli is a village in Somwarpet taluk in Kodagu district of Karnataka, India. It lies on SH-8.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mallalli Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mallalli Falls is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mallalli Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mysuru Airport (95 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (89 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mallalli Falls?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mallalli Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mallalli Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Mallalli Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mallalli Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kuttur, Sulimalthe, Somwarpet, Somwarpet taluk, Honnamana Kere.
